title: Cost Indicators & Query Patterns
description: Cost indicators, clause counts, and query pattern analysis.

panels.title: Flagged Requests
panels.description: Requests with at least one cost indicator firing.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) AND stress_cost_indicator_count >= 1

panels.title: Avg Indicator Count
panels.description: Mean number of cost indicators per request.

targets.rawSql: SELECT avg(stress_cost_indicator_count) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)

panels.title: Avg Stress Multiplier
panels.description: Mean stress multiplier applied to base score.

targets.rawSql: SELECT avg(stress_multiplier) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)

panels.title: Max Stress Multiplier
panels.description: Largest stress multiplier observed in the selected period.

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(stress_multiplier) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)

panels.title: Score Composition by Template
panels.description: Stacked contribution of each base-score component (Took / Shards / Hits / Bonus) per template — shows what drives the score.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_template AS bucket, avg(stress_components_took) AS "Took", avg(stress_components_shards) AS "Shards", avg(stress_components_hits) AS "Hits", avg(stress_components_bonus) AS "Bonus" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY 1 ASC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Base vs Final Score by Template
panels.description: Base score vs multiplier vs final score per template — reveals whether stress is driven by the base or the multiplier.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_template AS "Template", count() AS "Requests", avg(stress_base) AS "Avg Base", avg(stress_multiplier) AS "Avg Multiplier", avg(stress_score) AS "Avg Final Score", avg(stress_cost_indicator_count) AS "Avg Indicators" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY "Template" ORDER BY "Requests" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top Templates by Cost Indicator Count
panels.description: Templates ranked by average cost indicator count — query optimization candidates.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_template AS "Template", avg(stress_cost_indicator_count) AS "Avg Indicators", avg(stress_multiplier) AS "Avg Multiplier", avg(stress_score) AS "Avg Stress", count() AS "Requests" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY "Template" ORDER BY "Avg Indicators" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Score Breakdown by Template
panels.description: Full per-template breakdown: score, multiplier, weighted components, and raw ES metrics (latency percentiles, shards, hits).

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_template AS "Template", count() AS "Requests", avg(stress_score) AS "Avg Score", avg(stress_multiplier) AS "Multiplier", avg(stress_components_took) AS "ES Took (weighted)", quantile(0.5)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P50 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.95)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P95 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.99)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P99 ES Latency (ms)", avg(stress_components_shards) AS "Shards (weighted)", avg(response_shards_total) AS "Shards (raw)", avg(stress_components_hits) AS "Hits (weighted)", avg(response_hits) AS "Hits (raw)", avg(stress_components_bonus) AS "Bonus" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY "Template" ORDER BY "Requests" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Score Components
panels.description: Stacked trend of the four base-score components (Took, Shards, Hits, Bonus) over time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(stress_components_took) AS "Avg Took", avg(stress_components_shards) AS "Avg Shards", avg(stress_components_hits) AS "Avg Hits", avg(stress_components_bonus) AS "Avg Bonus" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Avg Base Score by Template
panels.description: Average base stress score over time, per template.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_template AS series, avg(stress_base) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND request_template IN (    SELECT request_template FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY request_template ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 10  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Avg Multiplier by Template
panels.description: Average stress multiplier over time, per template.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_template AS series, avg(stress_multiplier) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND request_template IN (    SELECT request_template FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY request_template ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 10  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Avg Cost Indicators by Application
panels.description: Average number of cost indicators per request over time, broken down by applicative provider.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, identity_applicative_provider AS series, avg(stress_cost_indicator_count) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND identity_applicative_provider IN (    SELECT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY identity_applicative_provider ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Flagged vs Total Requests
panels.description: Count of flagged (≥1 cost indicator) vs total requests — the ratio indicates how many queries are suboptimal.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, count() AS "Flagged Requests", count() AS "Total Requests" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) AND stress_cost_indicator_count >= 1 GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Cost Indicator Types - Frequency
panels.description: How often each cost indicator type fires in the selected period.

targets.rawSql: SELECT arrayJoin(if(empty(stress_cost_indicator_names), ['unflagged'], stress_cost_indicator_names)) AS bucket, count() AS "Count" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY "Count" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Stress Multiplier by Application
panels.description: Average stress multiplier per applicative provider.

targets.rawSql: SELECT identity_applicative_provider AS bucket, avg(stress_multiplier) AS "Avg Stress Multiplier" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY "Avg Stress Multiplier" DESC LIMIT 8

panels.title: Cost Indicator Count by Target Index
panels.description: Average cost indicators per request, per target index.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_target AS bucket, avg(stress_cost_indicator_count) AS "Avg Indicator Count" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY "Avg Indicator Count" DESC LIMIT 8

panels.title: Stress Multiplier by Target Index
panels.description: Average stress multiplier per target index.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_target AS bucket, avg(stress_multiplier) AS "Avg Multiplier" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY "Avg Multiplier" DESC LIMIT 8

panels.title: Clause Count Trends
panels.description: Average per-request counts of heavy clause types over time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(clause_counts_terms_values) AS "Avg terms_values", avg(clause_counts_agg) AS "Avg agg", avg(clause_counts_script) AS "Avg script", avg(clause_counts_wildcard) AS "Avg wildcard" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Bool Clause Breakdown
panels.description: Stacked trend of bool clause types per request (must / should / filter / must_not).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(clause_counts_bool_must) AS "Avg must", avg(clause_counts_bool_should) AS "Avg should", avg(clause_counts_bool_filter) AS "Avg filter", avg(clause_counts_bool_must_not) AS "Avg must_not" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

list.name: cluster
list.label: Cluster
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT cluster_name FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT cluster_name FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000

list.name: application
list.label: Application
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000

list.name: target
list.label: Target
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT request_target FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT request_target FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000

list.name: operation
list.label: Operation
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT request_operation FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT request_operation FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000

list.name: username
list.label: Username
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT identity_username FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT identity_username FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500

list.name: cost_indicator
list.label: Cost Indicator
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT arrayJoin(if(empty(stress_cost_indicator_names), ['unflagged'], stress_cost_indicator_names)) FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT arrayJoin(if(empty(stress_cost_indicator_names), ['unflagged'], stress_cost_indicator_names)) FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500

list.name: client_host
list.label: Client Host
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT identity_client_host FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT identity_client_host FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500

list.name: template
list.label: Template
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT request_template FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT request_template FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
